title: YLAB 2x Christmas Activity Book Set for Kids – Colouring, Sticker & Puzzle Books with Pencils – Festive Gift for Children Age 3-10 – Travel Activity Pack in Carry Case
features: 🎁 2 PACK – DOUBLE THE FUN! – Each pack includes 2 festive activity sets, perfect for siblings, party bags, or gifting – ideal for keeping kids entertained this Christmas!
📚 INCLUDES 8 ACTIVITY BOOKS & 12 COLOURING PENCILS – Each set contains: 2 x Colouring Books, 1 x Puzzle & Activity Book, 1 x Sticker Book, and 6 colouring pencils – that’s twice the creative fun!
🎅 FESTIVE & FUN FOR AGES 3–10 – Bursting with jolly Christmas characters like Santa, snowmen, reindeer and elves – great for developing creativity and fine motor skills.
❄️ PORTABLE & GIFT-READY – Comes in 2 bright red carry cases with handles – ideal for travel, Christmas Eve boxes, stocking fillers, party bags or classroom rewards.
♻️ ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIALS – Made from FSC MIX certified and recycled paper/card – a planet-friendly choice that’s widely recyclable. 🌍💚
description: Make this Christmas extra magical with the 🎁 YLAB Christmas Activity Book Set for Kids – 2 Pack – double the festive fun, perfect for siblings, friends, or gifting! 🖍️✨ Each festive set includes: 📘 2 Christmas Colouring Books 📗 1 Puzzle & Activity Book (with mazes, spot-the-difference and more) 📙 1 Sticker Book ✏️ 6 Colouring Pencils That’s a total of: 📚 4 Christmas Colouring Books 🧩 2 Puzzle & Activity Books 🎨 2 Sticker Books ✏️ 12 Colouring Pencils 🎒 2 Festive Carry Cases All beautifully packaged in red ❄️ carry cases with handles – perfect for travel, Christmas Eve boxes, or popping into stockings! 🎅 Designed for children aged 3 to 10 , these engaging books are filled with cheerful characters like Santa 🎅, reindeer 🦌, snowmen ⛄ and elves 🧝 . Great for developing creativity, fine motor skills, and focus – all while staying screen-free! 📵🧠 🌍 Eco-friendly too! Made from FSC MIX certified and recycled paper/card – fully recyclable and designed with sustainability in mind. ♻️💚 Whether you’re after travel-friendly entertainment, party favours, or thoughtful Christmas gifts – this double pack is a 🎄 must-have for festive fun!
